issues.title: KPI cards are below the fold on some screen sizes
issues.description: On smaller screens (1366x768), the KPI cards may not be immediately visible without scrolling. An executive needs the top-line numbers visible immediately.
reproduction_steps: Check if KPIs are visible without scrolling
issues.expected: KPIs visible in the viewport on first load, no scrolling required
issues.actual: Page header + KPI row may require slight scroll on smaller screens

issues.title: YoY Change shows 0.0% which is misleading
issues.description: The 'YoY Change' KPI shows 0.0%. An executive seeing this may think crime hasn't changed, but this is actually a calculation artifact (comparing to itself).
issues.expected: Either show a meaningful comparison or explain that the data is a single period

issues.title: Color coding inconsistency between KPIs
issues.description: Total Crimes uses cyan, Arrest Rate uses cyan, Domestic % uses amber, YoY Change uses conditional red/green. The color coding is not consistent with the meaning of the metrics.
issues.expected: Consistent color coding: green for positive metrics, red for negative, neutral for informational
issues.actual: Cyan used for both Total Crimes (informational) and Arrest Rate (performance)

issues.title: No dashboard summary or 'at a glance' section
issues.description: An executive wants a 30-second overview. The current dashboard has 8+ visualizations competing for attention. There is no summary section.
reproduction_steps: Try to get a complete picture in 5 seconds
issues.expected: A 'Summary' card at the top with the 3-4 most important takeaways
issues.actual: KPI cards only; no narrative summary

summary: Dashboard shows KPIs but has visual hierarchy issues, misleading YoY number, and no executive summary.
